AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>80f83059-1c1f-48ee-b244-23dd11ccc155</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ETGLocalInputVATReport"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FromDate"> <Value>=Parameters!DataSet1_FromDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ToDate"> <Value>=Parameters!DataSet1_ToDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="VendAccount"> <Value>=Parameters!DataSet1_VendAccount.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGLocalInputVATReportDP.ETGLocalInputVATReportTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="CompanyAddress"> <DataField>ETGLocalInputVATReportTmp.1.CompanyAddress</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CompanyCoRegNum"> Name="SourceRegulateAmountCur"> <DataField>ETGLocalInputVATReportTmp.1.SourceRegulateAmountCur</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="TaxRegistrationNumber"> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ETGLocalInputVATReport</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>
